svg.aria-label: High quality cover for Cloud Security Course Cohort 7 Week 7 covering Docker and Kubernetes fundamentals
svg.title: Cloud Security Course Cohort 7 Week 7: Understanding Docker and Kubernetes

g.text: Image layers : container runtime : registry flow
Build once : run anywhere : isolate process, filesystem, network
Desired state meets runtime state through declarative orchestration
Namespace boundaries : rollout flow : least privilege habits
From local container practice to cluster level operational thinking
